items.title: Zealthy Launches Enhanced Weight-Loss Care Platform With Integrated Zepbound Access and Insurance Support
items.summary: Zealthy announced the launch of its enhanced virtual weight-loss care platform that integrates telehealth services, insurance coordination, and prescription management for obesity treatment. The platform enables patients to complete online health assessments and connect with licensed providers who may prescribe Zepbound (tirzepatide), an FDA-approved GLP-1 medication. Zealthy's membership starts at $39 for the first month and $135 thereafter, with medication costs billed separately. With insurance, eligible patients may pay approximately $25 per month for Zepbound.
